Title: Umatilla National Forest - North Zone Spring Tree Planting
Awardee: THREE STRIPES CONTRACTING LLC Medford OR 97501 USA
Description: This contract solicitation is to secure services for coniferous tree planting of Government furnished tree seedlings by hand tool (hoedad) method on 451 acres of National Forest Lands. Conifer tree species to be planted include Western Larch (LAOC) and Ponderosa Pine (PIPO). There is only one stock type that will be planted under this contract; 160-plugs. Planting will occur across an elevational gradient of approximately 1,000ft – 1,500ft. The Contractor shall furnish all supplies and materials (except those designated as Governmentfurnished), equipment, tools, labor, supervision, transportation, and incidentals, to perform all work specified herein. LOCATION: Umatilla National Forest, Pomeroy and Walla Walla Ranger Districts. Project area is located in the Blue Mountains with some activity units located in Asotin County, Washington, and some activity units located in Umatilla and Union County, Oregon. See the attached project vicinity map and unit maps that are included as part of this contract.

This was awarded from a synopsis/solicitation for commercial services prepared in accordance with the format in subpart 12.2 as supplemented with additional information included in this notice. The announcement constituted the only solicitation; quotes were being requested and a written solicitation was not issued. Ten (10) quotes were received, only 6 vendors were acceptable in terms of technical, pricing, and delivery date, based on information and/or documentation submitted with the quotes. Title: R--This task order will support the development of Defense Planning, strategic plans, the annual development of the SSMP, industrial base monitoring at the enterprise level, and CFIUS activities
Awardee: VECTOR RESOURCE INC PO Box 38 Sewickley PA 15143 USA
Description: The Office of Strategic Planning and Analysis (NA-183) conducts strategic planning and resource advocacy to sustain and modernize a safe, secure, and effective stockpile for the United States nuclear deterrent on behalf of the Office of Defense Programs (DP). NA-183 leads the integration of DP planning processes for infrastructure, workforce, long-range budgeting, and nuclear security enterprise capabilities as part of the development and publication of the Stockpile Stewardship and Management Plan (SSMP). NA-183 also leads efforts for monitoring the Nuclear Industrial Base along with Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) activities for DP. This contract will support the development of DP strategic plans, the annual development of the SSMP, industrial base monitoring at the enterprise level, and CFIUS activities

Title: Sensor Platform Integration Shelters ( Revision of 3-27-26 )
Awardee: ADVANCED ENGINEERING SOLUTIONS & SERVICES, L.L.C. Belcamp MD 21017 USA
Description: Revised Description from Original Notice Published : 3-27-26 (See Attachment) This performance-based shelter program is to replicate and enhance existing, successfully developed prototype shelter systems. Building on this proven foundation, the contractor will integrate cutting-edge technologies onto military and commercial shelter, trailer, vehicle and transit case platforms, rapidly addressing urgent requirements for Quick Reaction Capability (QRC) C5ISR solutions. The contractor will be responsible for integrating, delivering, fielding, training on, and demonstrating the CSPI systems, significantly enhancing intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) capabilities for selected programs. This is a follow-on production FAR Based award. A Single -Award Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite- Quantity (IDIQ) will be utilized. Under - Title 10, United States Code (U.S.C.), Section 4022(f) Orders will be issued on a Firm Fixed Price (FFP) and Cost No Fee basis.
